Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.
Video.title: Turn Up the Heat

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how versatile phyllo dough is as he makes both sweet and savory dishes.
Video.title: The Magic of Phyllo

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: E.J. and Meril join dad Emeril to make some of their favorite recipes.
Video.title: Cooking with Your Kids

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Emeril creates dishes with heart-healthy nutrients: Portuguese-style grilled sardines, salmon with quinoa with roasted shallot and cherry vinaigrette, and mackerel with spinach and chickpea salad
Video.title: Heart-Healthy Meals

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Kicked-Up Clambake; Lobster and Sweet Corn Chowder; Clam Cakes with Tartar Sauce
Video.title: A Day at the Beach

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Planter's Rum Punch, Cornmeal and Ham Pancakes, Oyster Pie, Double Savory Pie Crust, Broiled Peaches with Bourbon Cream and Pecans
Video.title: Southern Breakfast

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Emeril shows the most useful kitchen equipment: quick and easy stir-fried squid with chili sauce and sirloin steak fajitas
Video.title: Which Pan is for What?

Video.summary: Embrace autumn with Emeril's sweet and savory apple recipes.
Video.title: Amazing Apples

Video.summary: Buttermilk and Lemon-Scented Pancakes with Warm Blueberry Syrup, Whole Trout Stuffed with Bacon and Eggplant Dressing, Campground Brownie Pie
Video.title: Emeril's Campground

Video.summary: Linguine with Seafood in Saffron Broth, Vegetable Casserole Abruzzese, Lamb with Balsamic Vinegar, Ricotta-Filled Pastries
Video.title: A Taste of Abruzzi

Video.summary: Summer Rolls with Hot Mustard Sauce, Orzo Stuffed Tomatoes, Pasta with Chickpeas and Spinach, Portobello Mushroom Burgers, Cherries Jubilee with Lady Fingers
Video.title: Vegetarian Delights

Video.summary: Creole Chicken, Red Beans and Rice Soup, Shrimp Court Bouillon, Roasted Flounder Stuffed with Eggplant and Cornbread Dressing, Sauce Piquant
Video.title: Creole Lite

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics, including hearty chicken pot pie topped with puff-pastry crust and Emeril's super-tasty spicy meatloaf
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Ham Hocks with Navy Beans; Ham Hocks and Goat Cheese Wontons
Video.title: Hocks

Video.summary: After sleeping in, a mouth-watering brunch is a great way to leisurely catch up with friends and family Emeril shows you a brunch classic from New Orleans
Video.title: Brunch

Video.summary: Pecan-Crusted Mozzarella with Baby Greens, Smoked Mozzarella, Lamb and Grilled Vegetable Mille-Feuille, Focaccia
Video.title: Fresh Mozzarella

Video.summary: Kicked-Up Asian Salad with Tuna and Funky Vinaigrette, Creole Mustard and Herb-Crusted Lamb with Mustard Sauce
Video.title: Cooking with Mustard

Video.summary: Baked Lobster, Boiled Lobster Salad with Creamy Tarragon Dressing, Vanilla Champagne Sauce
Video.title: Lobster
